argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const secUid = "{{ sec_uid }}"; const limit = Math.min(20, Math.max(1, {{ limit }} || 20)); const withComments = {{ with_comments }} !== false; const commentLimit = Math.min(10, Math.max(1, {{ comment_limit }} || 10)); const videoParams = new URLSearchParams({ sec_user_id: secUid, max_cursor: '0', count: String(limit), aid: '6383' }); const videoRes = await fetch('https://www.douyin.com/aweme/v1/web/aweme/post/?' + videoParams.toString(), { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', referer: 'https://www.douyin.com/' } }).then(r => r.json()); const awemeList = (videoRes.aweme_list || []).slice(0, limit); const results = []; for (let i = 0; i < awemeList.length; i++) { const v = awemeList[i]; const playUrl = v.video?.play_addr?.url_list?.[0] ?? ''; let topComments = []; if (withComments) { try { const commentParams = new URLSearchParams({ aweme_id: v.aweme_id, count: String(commentLimit), cursor: '0', aid: '6383' }); const commentRes = await fetch('https://www.douyin.com/aweme/v1/web/comment/list/?' + commentParams.toString(), { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', referer: 'https://www.douyin.com/' } }).then(r => r.json()); topComments = (commentRes.comments || []).slice(0, commentLimit).map(c => ({ text: c.text || '', digg_count: c.digg_count ?? 0, nickname: c.user?.nickname || '' })); } catch (e) {} } results.push({ index: i + 1, aweme_id: v.aweme_id, title: v.desc ?? '', duration: Math.round((v.video?.duration ?? 0) / 1000), digg_count: v.statistics?.digg_count ?? 0, play_url: playUrl, top_comments: topComments }); } return results; }

description: 获取指定用户的视频列表（含下载地址和热门评论）
name: UserVideos
